Package org.rodinp.core.builder

Interface IGraph

All Known Implementing Classes:
GraphTransaction
public interface IGraph
Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • IExtractor

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addTarget(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile target)
    Adds a a node "path" with associated tool into the graph.
    void
    addToolDependency(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile source, org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile target, boolean prioritize)
    Adds a dependency controlled by a tool to the graph.
    void
    addUserDependency(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile origin, org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile source, org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile target, boolean prioritize)
    Adds a dependency controlled by the user to the graph.

  • Method Details

    • addTarget

      void addTarget(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile target) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Adds a a node "path" with associated tool into the graph. If a node with this path exists already only the tool is reassigned.
      Parameters:
      target - The file of the target node
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if the graph could not be modified

    • addUserDependency

      void addUserDependency(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile origin, org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile source, org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile target, boolean prioritize) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Adds a dependency controlled by the user to the graph. Target must be a node added during the same extraction.
      Parameters:
      origin - The origin of this dependency. This should be a resource visible to the user, i.e. not a derived resource.
      source - The source of the dependency.
      target - The target of the dependency.
      prioritize - True if this dependency should be prioritized in the topological order derived from the graph.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if the graph could not be modified

    • addToolDependency

      void addToolDependency(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile source, org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile target, boolean prioritize) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Adds a dependency controlled by a tool to the graph. Target must be a node added during the same extraction.
      Parameters:
      source - The source of the dependency.
      target - The target of the dependency.
      prioritize - True if this dependency should be prioritized in the topological order derived from the graph.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if the graph could not be modified
